project_goal: AIOS recovery crate — MINIX-inspired multi-level recovery boundaries; complemented by OS kernel research for AI-OS.NET

completed_steps: Gathered Wikipedia research on 12 operating systems: BeOS, Haiku, L4, seL4, Plan 9, Inferno, Singularity, Midori, QNX, Exokernel, Fuchsia, Genode

Created AIOS applicability matrix ranking 12 OSes from CRITICAL to MEDIUM priority
